backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Change the login endpoint from GET to POST to follow REST best practices for authentication.
Switch from query parameters to a JSON request body for passing credentials, requiring a DTO.
Add a new endpoint to retrieve a demo admin user, guarded by environment profiles.
Inject DemoService and Environment to support the new demo admin functionality.
Inject InstitutionService to provide institution context for demo user creation.
Import User.State enum to specify user status during creation.
Update createMemberWithAuth call to include institution and state parameters.
Update createVolunteerWithAuth call to include state parameter.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions on JDK 21.
Catch SecurityException instead of SignatureException to align with updated JWT library API or broader exception handling requirements.
Replace the deprecated javax.servlet import with the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.servlet import to comply with the new namespace requirements.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions on JDK 21.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Change the active field from Boolean wrapper to boolean primitive to simplify null handling and memory usage.
Ensure a confirmation token is generated immediately upon user instantiation.
Migrate persistence annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Introduce a persistent 'active' boolean field to track user status, replacing the hardcoded return value.
Update isActive() and add setActive() to use the new field instead of returning a constant true.
Add a public no-argument constructor to the DTO class to ensure compatibility with frameworks requiring default constructors.
Add a public no-argument constructor to the DTO class to ensure compatibility with frameworks requiring default constructors.
Remove unnecessary blank lines between field declarations to clean up code formatting.
